title: Fly Zapper Electric, Fly Killer,20W UV Indoor Electric Bug Zapper - Powerful 3000V Grid Electronic Bug Catcher for Bedroom, Living Room and Kitchen
bullet_points: High Efficient Mosquito Control：Powerful fly catcher with 3000V high-voltage grid&20W UV –chemical-free ,safe and environmental protection.Our equipment is very effective against mosquitoes, flies, moths and other flying insects.

Safety :Our fly Catcher has a 360˚ full surrounded mesh screen to prevent children and pets from accidentally touching the grid doubling the safety.The mosquito lamp has a housing made of flame retardant ABS material, safe and high temperature resistant., much safer than others.

CHEMICAL FREE: Our fly zapper is 100% chemical and odor free, especially safe for pregnant women, children and pets. Get rid of smelly, nasty sprays and use a high voltage zapper to keep your home free of nuisance. This is a great alternative for indoor zapping.

Removable easy-clean : The mosquito-killing lamp has a removable tray, dead insects collect at the bottom of the unit, the internal trap box can be easily disassembled and cleaned, cleaning is also newbie friendly, keeping the equipment running efficiently for a long time.

Widely used：Each electric fly killer zapper comes with a chain for wall hanging to keep out-of-reach of children and pets, or can be free standing.Typically, hang it high as that is where the nuisances hangout.Ideal for home, office, kitchens, restaurants, schools, hospitals, etc. or for commercial and industrial use.
